interfaces.label: Core Competencies
interfaces.title: Technical
interfaces.description: A comprehensive arsenal of modern technologies and frameworks, organized by domain expertise.

skills.name: Custom Development
skills.description: Expert in custom theme and plugin development including compatibility with multisite environments and excellent performance optimizations.

skills.name: Headless WordPress
skills.description: Building headless WordPress sites with custom REST API endpoints and modern frontend frameworks like ReactJS, Astro, or Next.js.

skills.name: Custom Fields and Post Types
skills.description: Creating custom post types and fields to extend WordPress functionality and data structure.

skills.name: Gutenberg blocks Development
skills.description: Creating custom Gutenberg blocks to extend WordPress functionality and enhance content creation.

skills.name: Multisite Management
skills.description: Managing and optimizing WordPress multisite networks for efficient multi-domain or multi-subdomain deployments.

skills.name: WordPress security
skills.description: Implementing security best practices, hardening WordPress installations, and protecting against vulnerabilities.

skills.name: WooCommerce
skills.description: Building e-commerce solutions with WooCommerce and custom features if needed.

skills.name: Elementor and similar page builders
skills.description: If needed, I can work with Elementor or similar page builders to create custom layouts and designs.

skills.name: HTML5 & CSS3
skills.description: Semantic HTML5 structure and modern CSS3 features including Flexbox, Grid, animations, and responsive design.

skills.name: JavaScript & TypeScript
skills.description: Modern JavaScript development with ES6+ features, async/await, promises, and TypeScript for type safety.

skills.name: PHP/OOP
skills.description: Object-oriented programming with PHP, design patterns, and WordPress custom development.

skills.name: Astro
skills.description: Static site generation (SSG) and server-side rendering (SSR) with Astro framework, with WordPress integration has backend if needed.

skills.name: ReactJS
skills.description: Building dynamic user interfaces with ReactJS, hooks, state management, and component-based architecture.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap and similars
skills.description: Building responsive and modern user interfaces with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap and similar utility-first frameworks.

skills.name: MySQL
skills.description: Relational database management, query optimization, stored procedures, and replication strategies.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.description: Advanced SQL features, JSONB support, full-text search, and performance tuning for complex queries.

skills.name: LARAVEL
skills.description: Building robust backend applications with Laravel, RESTful APIs, and database management.

skills.name: Git Version Control
skills.description: Version control, branching strategies, pull requests and code reviews.

skills.name: REST API Integrations
skills.description: Integrating with REST APIs, handling authentication, and managing API responses.

skills.name: n8n
skills.description: Building workflow automations, API integrations, and data synchronization between multiple platforms, focusing on integrations with WordPress.

skills.name: Performance Optimization
skills.description: Optimizing website performance, reducing load times, and improving user experience.

skills.name: SEO
skills.description: Implementing SEO best practices like: Caché, Google Search Console, Google Analytics, meta tags, meta description, meta keywords, etc. Optimizing website for search engines and AI platforms, and improving website visibility.

skills.name: Figma
skills.description: UI/UX design, prototyping, component systems, and design-to-code workflows for web applications.

skills.name: Cpanel & Plesk
skills.description: Managing shared hosting environments, domain management, email configuration, and server administration.

skills.name: Netlify
skills.description: Continuous deployment, serverless functions, form handling, and edge network optimization.

skills.name: Vercel
skills.description: Frontend deployment, edge functions, analytics, and seamless integration with Next.js applications.

skills.name: GitHub Actions
skills.description: CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, deployment workflows, and release automation.
